entities.name: METABOLITES
entities.description: Intermediate products formed during metabolism that play roles in providing energy, supporting structure, transmitting signals, catalyzing reactions, enhancing defense, and interacting with other species

entities.name: PLANT METABOLOMICS
entities.description: Research field aiming to precisely detect all metabolites found within tissues of plants

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: The source organisms from which tissues are sampled for metabolite extraction and analysis

entities.name: GAS CHROMATOGRAPHY-MASS SPECTROMETRY
entities.description: A powerful analytical technique that combines gas chromatography's separation capabilities with mass spectrometry for the structural identification of metabolites

entities.name: METHANOL
entities.description: A chemical used for the extraction of metabolites from plant tissues

entities.name: CHLOROFORM
entities.description: A chemical used for the extraction of metabolites from plant tissues

entities.name: RIBITOL
entities.description: A chemical used for the extraction of metabolites from plant tissues

entities.name: MSTFA
entities.description: A chemical used for the extraction of metabolites from plant tissues

entities.name: TMCS
entities.description: A chemical used for the extraction of metabolites from plant tissues

entities.name: CHROMATOGRAPHY
entities.description: A general analytical separation technique used in modern metabolomics to analyze metabolites

entities.name: LIQUID CHROMATOGRAPHY
entities.description: A specific type of chromatography used to analyze metabolites from plant samples

entities.name: GAS CHROMATOGRAPHY
entities.description: A specific type of chromatography used to analyze metabolites from plant samples and a component of GC-MS

entities.name: CAPILLARY ELECTROPHORESIS
entities.description: A specific type of chromatography/separation technique used to analyze metabolites from plant samples

entities.name: MASS SPECTROMETRY
entities.description: An analytical technique used in combination with chromatography to analyze and identify metabolites

entities.name: NMR SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A spectroscopic technique used in modern metabolomics to analyze metabolites from plant samples
